title: AXTabStripChangedEvent
description: Event emitted when the active tab changes in a tab component.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: Canonical TypeScript definition of the tab strip changed event.

props.name: component
props.description: The tabs component that emitted the event. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: htmlElement
props.description: The HTML element of the tabs component. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: isUserInteraction
props.description: Whether the event was triggered by user interaction. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: tab
props.description: The tab item that became active.

props.name: index
props.description: The index of the active tab.
